steps.t: King Thorin is at his throne in the Hall Under the Mountain.
King Thorin is at his throne in the Hall Under the Mountain.
Durin has followed the Zhélruka into the Grey Mountains, and at King Thorin's request you should look for him on the road that climbs into Ered Mithri…
You have found Durin on the road that climbs into the Grey Mountains.
